mapper.select: SELECT cb.*, cc.category_name, cc.icon_code FROM CARD_BENEFITS cb LEFT JOIN CARD_CATEGORIES cc ON cb.category_id = cc.category_id WHERE cb.card_id = #{cardId} AND cb.visible_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY cb.display_order ASC NULLS LAST
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CARD_BENEFITS.CURRVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CARD_BENEFITS ( card_id, category_id, benefit_title, benefit_type, discount_rate, discount_amount, point_rate, cashback_rate, monthly_limit_amount, daily_limit_amount, minimum_payment_amount, benefit_condition, display_text, display_order, visible_yn, created_at ) VALUES ( #{cardId}, #{categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{benefitTitle}, #{benefitType}, #{discountRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{discountAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{pointRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{cashbackRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{monthlyLimitAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{dailyLimitAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{minimumPaymentAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{benefitCondition, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{displayText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{displayOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{visibleYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' )

INSERT INTO CARD_BENEFITS ( card_id, category_id, benefit_title, benefit_type, discount_rate, discount_amount, point_rate, cashback_rate, monthly_limit_amount, daily_limit_amount, minimum_payment_amount, benefit_condition, display_text, display_order, visible_yn, created_at )
SELECT #{b.cardId}, #{b.categoryId, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{b.benefitTitle}, #{b.benefitType}, #{b.discountRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{b.discountAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{b.pointRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{b.cashbackRate, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{b.monthlyLimitAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{b.dailyLimitAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{b.minimumPaymentAmount, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{b.benefitCondition, jdbcType=CLOB}, #{b.displayText, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{b.displayOrder, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{b.visibleYn, jdbcType=CHAR}, 'Y'), SYSTIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul' FROM DUAL
